attributes.Sql Query:
select 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY             
 , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY1 
 , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY1                  
, CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY  
 , CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                
, CASE WHEN WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                 
, CASE WHEN NSLTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY END RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY                 
 , CASE WHEN WI.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY END DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY 
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,'UNKNOWN'AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
 , CASE WHEN WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
, CASE WHEN WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
 , CASE WHEN WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT ,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT        ,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD           ,
DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD               ,
DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD            ,
DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD                 ,
DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD        ,
AR_TRX_DATETIME                      ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD            ,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD                ,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG             ,
DV_SERVICE_FLG                       ,
DV_REVENUE_FLG                       ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT               ,
'IND_ADJ_AE' EDW_CREATE_USER  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
'IND_ADJ_AE' EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD                ,
BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD           ,
GL_DT                                ,
BK_SS_CD                             ,
DV_EXTENDED_QTY                      ,
OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD               ,
ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD                     ,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD         ,
TRANSACTION_DT                       ,
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY       ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE                      ,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE                  ,
DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG              ,
DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG            
   , CASE WHEN WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY END REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,-9999  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY1 ,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                    ,
DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                       ,
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD                  ,
DV_FMV_FLG                           ,
DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD            
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 , CASE WHEN WI.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
POB_TYPE_CD                          ,
NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                   ,
SOURCE_ENTITY_NAME                   ,
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)) AS VARCHAR(70)) 
 AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION               ,  
RECURRING_FLG   ,
DV_REV_CLASS_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY18 */                      
,'N' as DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added as part of Q4FY19 PnL Changes*/ 
,'Immediate' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
,-999 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,'Immediate' BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,-999 DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
from 
$$STGDB.WI_INV_REC_REV_IND_ADJ WI	   
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_TERR_RSTMNT_MAPPING NSLTRM
  ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NSLTRM.ORIG_SLS_TERR_KEY 
WHERE DV_SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'

select 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY             
 , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY1 
 , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY1                  
, CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY  
 , CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                
, CASE WHEN WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                 
, CASE WHEN NSLTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY END RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY                 
 , CASE WHEN WI.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY END DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY 
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,'UNKNOWN'AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
 , CASE WHEN WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
, CASE WHEN WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
 , CASE WHEN WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT ,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT        ,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD           ,
DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD               ,
DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD            ,
DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD                 ,
DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD        ,
AR_TRX_DATETIME                      ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD            ,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD                ,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG             ,
DV_SERVICE_FLG                       ,
DV_REVENUE_FLG                       ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT               ,
'IND_ADJ_AE' EDW_CREATE_USER  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
'IND_ADJ_AE' EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD                ,
BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD           ,
GL_DT                                ,
BK_SS_CD                             ,
DV_EXTENDED_QTY                      ,
OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD               ,
ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD                     ,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD         ,
TRANSACTION_DT                       ,
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY       ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE                      ,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE                  ,
DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG              ,
DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG            
   , CASE WHEN WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY END REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY 
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,-9999  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY1 ,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                    ,
DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                       ,
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD                  ,
DV_FMV_FLG                           ,
DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD            
 , CASE WHEN WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 , CASE WHEN WI.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
POB_TYPE_CD                          ,
NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                   ,
SOURCE_ENTITY_NAME                   ,
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
 TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)) AS VARCHAR(70)) 
 AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION               ,  
RECURRING_FLG   ,
DV_REV_CLASS_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY18 */    
,'N' as DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added as part of Q4FY19 PnL Changes*/ 
,'Immediate' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
,-999 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,'Immediate' BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,-999 DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
from 
$$STGDB.WI_INV_REC_REV_IND_ADJ WI	
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_TERR_RSTMNT_MAPPING NSLTRM
  ON WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NSLTRM.ORIG_SLS_TERR_KEY 
WHERE DV_SERVICE_FLG = 'N'
